name: blogcast
description: BlogCast MCP — One post. Every platform. Powered by Notion + Claude.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client" "npm run dev --workspace=mcp"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=mcp && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.clean: rm -rf mcp/dist server/dist client/dist node_modules mcp/node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules
